# md-check

> AI-powered technical SEO and AEO auditor that scores pages for search-engine indexability and AI answer-engine visibility.

## Product

- [Home](https://md-check.com/): Overview of md-check's audit capabilities and scoring system.
- [Run Audit](https://md-check.com/audit): Instantly audit any URL for SEO and AEO signals.
- [Projects](https://md-check.com/projects): Save URL sets and track audit history over time.

## Docs

- [How Scoring Works](https://md-check.com/docs/scoring): Explains SEO/AEO 0–100 scores, render modes, visibility, and schema detection.
- [AEO Signals](https://md-check.com/docs/aeo): Details on AI-crawler access, aiAccess.searchBlocked, and markdown serving.
- [Schema & Structured Data](https://md-check.com/docs/schema): How schemaTypes are detected and why they matter for AI attribution.
- [robots.txt & Crawler Access](https://md-check.com/docs/robots): Guidance on unblocking OAI-SearchBot, Claude-SearchBot, and PerplexityBot.
- [llms.txt Standard](https://md-check.com/docs/llms-txt): What the llms.txt format is and how md-check generates it.
- [GitHub Integration](https://md-check.com/docs/github): How to connect a repo and ship fixes as pull requests.

## About

- [About md-check](https://md-check.com/about): Mission, methodology, and the team behind the tool.
- [Changelog](https://md-check.com/changelog): Recent feature updates and audit engine improvements.
